entity.summary: Supra-native decentralized trading ecosystem combining a hybrid multi-asset AMM, swap routing, token creation and migration, liquidity provision, staking, portfolio tracking, and automated trading tools.
entity.notes: Atmos officially launched its core application on Supra mainnet on 2025-09-23. Atmos Studio is a launchpad component of the same ecosystem and remains excluded as a separate HEI entity.

events.title: Atmos launched on Supra mainnet
events.description: Atmos opened its Supra mainnet trading ecosystem with swap routing, token creation, portfolio tracking, and liquidity functions.
events.notes: The official project account announced the launch and the Supra community preserved the same dated release.

evidence.title: Atmos is live on Supra mainnet
evidence.notes: First-party launch announcement for the Supra mainnet application.

evidence.title: Atmos is live on Supra mainnet
evidence.notes: Dated Supra ecosystem post preserves the launch announcement and the live product set.

evidence.title: Atmos Protocol
evidence.notes: Current first-party site exposes trading, rewards, token launch, and application links.

evidence.title: Atmos Protocol documentation
evidence.notes: First-party documentation defines Atmos as a Supra-native DeFi trading ecosystem and documents its aggregator, Hyper-AMM, token studio, and automated strategies.

evidence.title: Atmos smart-contract audit report
evidence.notes: Published security review identifies the Atmos mainnet contracts as the native liquidity engine and DEX for Supra.
